The Hindu Newspaper Analysis | 29th April, 2026| UPSC Current Affairs Today | Sarmad Mehraj

Stay ahead in your UPSC 2026 & 2027 preparation with The Hindu Newspaper Analysis – 29th  April, 2026, expertly explained by Sarmad Sir. This session provides a complete UPSC daily current affairs analysis, specially curated for UPSC Prelims, Mains, and Interview stages.

In this UPSC current affairs today video, we analyze the most important news from The Hindu newspaper, focusing on topics highly relevant to the UPSC syllabus 2025, including international relations, Indian economy, environment and pollution, geopolitics, and India’s foreign policy.

This The Hindu analysis for UPSC is designed to help aspirants with answer writing enrichment, conceptual clarity, and current affairs linkage, which are essential for IAS exam preparation. The discussion is exam-oriented and aligned with the latest UPSC CSE pattern.

This video is extremely useful for candidates preparing for UPSC IAS, Civil Services Examination, State PCS, and other competitive exams. Watching this daily newspaper analysis for UPSC consistently will strengthen your current affairs foundation and improve your performance in both Prelims and Mains 2026 & 2027.
